name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Longwood, FL's Cash America Pawn on 17-92 Hwy offers quick pawn loans and collateral-based cash advances with extended hours through Saturday.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn's Longwood, FL location sits on North 17-92 Highway in central Longwood, operating as a standalone pawn shop. The store is open Monday through Saturday, 9 AM to 6 PM, with Sunday hours from 12 PM to 5 PM, making it convenient for Longwood residents who need flexible access to collateral-based lending.

This Cash America Pawn location specializes in quick pawn loans, gold and jewelry purchasing, and collateral-based cash advances without credit checks. You can reach the Longwood store directly at +1 407-695-7400 for quotes, inquiries, or to discuss your specific borrowing needs.

For Longwood residents needing immediate cash, bring a valid ID and your collateral to the North 17-92 Highway location for quick evaluation. The pawn process provides same-day funding without a credit check—making it a straightforward alternative when you need cash fast.
pros: Non-recourse pawn loans — defaulting only forfeits the collateral, no debt collection or credit damage
Over 3,300 locations across 29 U.S. states, DC, UK, and Latin America for broad accessibility
Buys gold, silver, and platinum for same-day cash payouts
Layaway plan available with just 10% down for purchases
No credit check required for pawn loans
Publicly traded S&P MidCap 400 company — financially stable and regulated
Lease-to-own options available through AFF subsidiary at 15,000+ retail merchant partners
cons: Interest rates and fee schedules are not disclosed on the website — a major transparency gap
Pawned items are typically valued far below retail or resale market value
Lease-to-own products through AFF can carry high total costs relative to retail price
Loan terms are short by nature; missing the redemption window means permanent loss of the item
Not available in all 50 states — coverage gaps exist
best_for: Consumers who need fast cash without a credit check and own items of value to pledge
Bargain shoppers looking for discounted electronics, jewelry, tools, or musical instruments
People selling unwanted gold, silver, or jewelry for immediate cash
Shoppers who want to buy on layaway with minimal upfront commitment
diagnosis: Cash America Pawn (operating under FirstCash) is best for consumers who need immediate cash without a credit check, own pawnable assets, or want affordable secondhand merchandise. The main caveat is that pawn loan costs are not disclosed upfront and item valuations are typically well below market — making this a convenience-of-last-resort borrowing option, not a cost-competitive one.
services: Non-recourse pawn loans secured by personal property
Gold, silver, and platinum buying for immediate cash
Retail merchandise sales (electronics, tools, jewelry, appliances, sporting goods)
Tools and appliances buying and selling
Point-of-sale retail finance for consumer goods and services
Store locator for 2,500+ North and Latin America locations
meta_description: Cash America Pawn at 135 N 17-92 Hwy, Longwood, FL. Get quick pawn loans with no credit check and same-day cash advances.
